title: andropogon lateralis
intro: Andropogon lateralis, also known as the red grass or buffalo grass, is a type of grass native to the tropical regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Andropogon lateralis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and aid in digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
